_comment: Smoke-command manifest for examples/. Every immediate subdirectory of examples/ MUST have an entry here. Run examples/check-examples.sh to verify coverage. Add an entry whenever a new example directory is added.
convention: Each key is the directory name under examples/. 'smoke' is the command a developer runs after starting a local beaterd (docker compose up beaterd). 'notes' is optional context.

python.notes: Requires: pip install opentelemetry-sdk opentelemetry-exporter-otlp-proto-grpc; local beaterd on :4317. Dockerfile also provided for container-based smoke.

rust.notes: Files in examples/rust/ are registered as [[example]] targets of sdks/rust/. Build-smoke proves they compile against the current SDK API. For a live run: cargo run --example tracing_app --manifest-path sdks/rust/Cargo.toml

temporal.smoke: echo 'temporal: docs-only — see examples/temporal/README.md for curl-based smoke command'
temporal.notes: No standalone runnable file; the integration is doc-demonstrated via Temporal CLI + curl. The live test lives in crates/beater-temporal.

typescript.notes: Requires: npm install express @opentelemetry/sdk-node @opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-proto; local beaterd on :8080.
